title: CT2.decide.survivor completed discharge record — Survivor classification — criticality refinement or response defect
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.decide.survivor. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.decide.survivor; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Survivor classification — criticality refinement or response defect.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.decide.survivor; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.decide.survivor, matching its decision runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.decide.survivor: S-Dich, S-Rout.

contains.description: Requires S-Dich, which provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Requires S-Rout, which constructs the declared typed CT3 or CT10 payload.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.decide.survivor; one S-Dich, S-Rout record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Dich evidence at CT2.decide.survivor; this instance provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Discriminator for the S-Rout evidence at CT2.decide.survivor; this instance constructs the declared typed CT3 or CT10 payload.

statement.informal: Survivor classification — criticality refinement or response defect.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
